author: woohyeonHeo
body: #### PR description: We update the ME0 L1Trigger emulator in CMSSW to the lastest version of firmware. ##### ME0 Trigger object producer - Algorithm for ME0 Trigger: - GEM DPG presentation: - The code is based on the existing python emulator. () + Its structure is designed to keep the same structure of the python emulator. - There is 2 version of EDProducer for this algorithm; one produce collections of "ME0Stub" (old version), and the other produce collections of "ME0TriggerDigi" (new version). + ME0TriggerDigi is existed data format class before the algorithm is implemented to CMSSW. It is competible class to the other firmware emulator in CMSSW. #### PR validation: - The code format has applied with `scram build code-format` and tested with `scram build code-checks`. - The output of the CMSSW code and the python emulator is identical except for ~0.01 difference in fitting results. + The difference is most likely due to the fixed point calculation. + Result of `diff [CMSSW outputs] [python emulator outputs]`: - The default process (e.g. reco, raw2digi, etc.) did not modified. Therefore, there is no change in running `runTheMatrix.py`
title: Update ME0 online segment finding algorithm for L1T
